name: SQL string concatenation
diff_content:
diff --git a/db.py b/db.py
--- a/db.py
+++ b/db.py
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 def lookup(user_id):
-    return "safe"
+    q = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"
+    return cursor.execute(q)

name: SSRF via requests with user URL
diff_content:
diff --git a/fetch.py b/fetch.py
--- a/fetch.py
+++ b/fetch.py
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
+def load(url):
+    return requests.get(url).text

name: Path traversal open
diff_content:
diff --git a/files.py b/files.py
--- a/files.py
+++ b/files.py
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
+def read(name):
+    return open("/data/" + name).read()

name: Unescaped string interpolation in HTML
diff_content:
diff --git a/views.py b/views.py --- a/views.py +++ b/views.py @@ -1,2 +1,3 @@ +def user_page(u): + return "
" + u + "
"

name: Command injection os.system
diff_content:
diff --git a/admin.py b/admin.py
--- a/admin.py
+++ b/admin.py
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
+def ping(host):
+    os.system("ping " + host)

name: Parameterized SQL
diff_content:
diff --git a/db.py b/db.py
--- a/db.py
+++ b/db.py
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 def lookup(user_id):
-    return "safe"
+    q = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?"
+    return cursor.execute(q, (user_id,))

name: SSRF allowlisted hosts
diff_content:
diff --git a/fetch.py b/fetch.py
--- a/fetch.py
+++ b/fetch.py
@@ -1,2 +1,8 @@
+ALLOW = {"api.example.com"}
+def load(url):
+    from urllib.parse import urlparse
+    if urlparse(url).hostname not in ALLOW:
+        raise ValueError("blocked")
+    return requests.get(url, timeout=5).text

name: Path basename guard
diff_content:
diff --git a/files.py b/files.py
--- a/files.py
+++ b/files.py
@@ -1,2 +1,5 @@
+import os
 def read(name):
-    pass
+    base = "/data"
+    safe = os.path.basename(name)
+    return open(os.path.join(base, safe)).read()

name: Escaped HTML output
diff_content:
diff --git a/views.py b/views.py --- a/views.py +++ b/views.py @@ -1,2 +1,4 @@ +import html def user_page(u): - pass + return "
" + html.escape(u) + "
"

name: Subprocess list without shell
diff_content:
diff --git a/admin.py b/admin.py
--- a/admin.py
+++ b/admin.py
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
+import subprocess
 def ping(host):
-    pass
+    return subprocess.run(["ping", "-c", "1", host], capture_output=True, text=True)
